AiInterpretation.title: Messages from the Universe
AiInterpretation.error_stream: Connection to the universe lost, please try again.
AiInterpretation.subtitle: Mystical AI interprets your cards.
AiInterpretation.error_desc: The energy of all things is in turmoil. Cannot connect.
AiInterpretation.followup_placeholder: Ask the Stars more about this reading...
AiInterpretation.limit_desc: The energy of the galaxy in this session has been exhausted (5/5 questions). Too many distractions will disturb the original message. Please accept and contemplate the essence above.
AiInterpretation.quota_disclaimer: Limit 5 follow-up questions. Consumes AI Quota but free Diamonds if card level is high enough.
